name: Sri Vishnu Sahasranama Parayanam
description: Weekly group recitation of Sri Vishnu Sahasranama Sthotram for everyone's health and well-being.

name: Sri Sita Rama Kalyanam
description: The divine celestial wedding of Lord Sri Rama and Goddess Sita. A grand celebration with elaborate decorations, rituals, and prasadam.

name: Vaikunta Ekadashi
description: Special prayers and celebrations marking the auspicious day of Vaikunta Ekadashi.

name: Deepavali Celebrations
description: Festival of lights celebrated with the community — cultural performances, group prayers, and a grand feast.

name: Navaratri & Dasara
description: Nine nights of divine celebrations honoring Goddess Durga, followed by Vijaya Dashami festivities.
